value_chain_position: Hospitality-specific property management system (PMS) and point-of-sale software; sells SaaS + payments to hotels, resorts, casinos, and food-service operators.
relative_comps: Agilysys occupies a genuine vertical-SaaS-plus-payments niche in hospitality — once a casino or resort is live on rGuest PMS, switching costs are high due to deep workflow integration. Its 17% 3-year CAGR and improving FCF profile support the fintech_rails tag more than pure payment processors, as it bundles software with embedded payments. Load-bearing score of 3 reflects real but bounded moat: Oracle OPERA is deeply entrenched in large-hotel enterprise, while Mews and Cloudbeds compete hard in independent hotel segments. Agilysys earns a higher confidence tag than generic SMB SaaS.
